---
title: "Exploratory Grand Model"
subtitle: "BBB / BUB / BRB — second-order brand equity from all architecture latents"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    df-print: kable
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: true
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| cache: false
source(here::here("R", "00_paths.R"))
source(here::here("R", "01_packages.R"))
source(here::here("R", "12_lavaan_models.R"))
source(here::here("R", "11_fit_helpers.R"))
source(here::here("R", "20_fit_cfa.R"))
source(here::here("R", "10_datasets.R"))
stopifnot(exists("DATASETS"))

# All analyses on the strict identical-case sample (all three models fitted)
dat <- DATASETS$cross
message("Cross-sample n = ", nrow(dat), " evaluations")

# Theoretical BBB / BUB / BRB block assignments
# BBB = Brand Building Block:  awareness, familiarity, recall
# BUB = Brand Usage Block:     image, associations, quality, differentiation
# BRB = Brand Relationship Block: trust, commitment, identification

block_labels <- list(
  BBB = c("FC_BR","FC_BD","FC_BF","BO_BF","BO_RC",
           "RO_BF","RO_BS"),
  BUB = c("FC_BC","FC_BS",
           "RO_BI","RO_BA","RO_BD","RO_BR"),
  BRB = c("BO_TR","BO_CO",
           "RO_AC","RO_EC","RO_ID")
)
```

# Stage 1 — Extract factor scores from all three models

```{r}
#| label: factor-scores
#| cache: true

# Helper: safe factor score extraction from a CFA fit
get_scores <- function(syntax, data, prefix = "") {
  fit <- tryCatch(
    lavaan::cfa(syntax, data = data, estimator = "MLR",
                missing = "fiml", std.lv = TRUE),
    error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(fit) || !lavaan::lavInspect(fit, "converged")) return(NULL)
  fs <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(lavaan::lavPredict(fit)), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(fs)) return(NULL)
  if (nzchar(prefix)) names(fs) <- paste0(prefix, names(fs))
  fs
}

# Fit each architecture on DATASETS$cross (MLR for speed + lavPredict compat)
fs_fc <- get_scores(cfa_fc_higher_order_original(), dat, "FC.")
fs_bo <- get_scores(cfa_bo_original(),              dat, "BO.")
fs_ro <- get_scores(cfa_ro_original(),              dat, "RO.")

# Combine into one factor-score matrix
fs_all <- dplyr::bind_cols(
  if (!is.null(fs_fc)) fs_fc else data.frame(),
  if (!is.null(fs_bo)) fs_bo else data.frame(),
  if (!is.null(fs_ro)) fs_ro else data.frame()
)
fs_all <- fs_all[, !duplicated(names(fs_all)), drop = FALSE]
message("Factor score columns: ", paste(names(fs_all), collapse = ", "))
message("Rows with complete scores: ", sum(complete.cases(fs_all)))
```

# Stage 2 — Correlations among architecture latents

```{r}
#| label: latent-correlations
cor_mat <- cor(fs_all, use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "pearson")
round(cor_mat, 2) |> as.data.frame() |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Latent") |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::tab_header("Pairwise Pearson correlations among first-order factor scores",
                 subtitle = paste0("n = ", nrow(fs_all), " (pairwise complete)")) |>
  gt::fmt_number(where(is.numeric), decimals = 2) |>
  gt::sub_missing(missing_text = "—")
```

## EFA on factor scores

```{r}
#| label: efa-latents
#| cache: true
fs_complete <- fs_all[complete.cases(fs_all), ]
if (nrow(fs_complete) >= 30 && ncol(fs_complete) >= 3) {
  # Parallel analysis to determine number of factors
  fa_par <- psych::fa.parallel(fs_complete, fm = "ml", fa = "fa",
                                n.iter = 100, plot = FALSE)
  n_factors <- max(1, fa_par$nfact)
  message("Parallel analysis suggests ", n_factors, " factor(s)")

  # EFA with oblique rotation (factors expected to correlate)
  fa_res <- psych::fa(fs_complete, nfactors = n_factors,
                      rotate = "oblimin", fm = "ml")
  print(psych::fa.sort(fa_res), digits = 2, cut = 0.30)
} else {
  message("Too few complete cases for EFA (n = ", nrow(fs_complete), ")")
}
```

# Stage 3 — BBB / BUB / BRB higher-order CFA

```{r}
#| label: bbb-bub-brb-syntax
# Assign available factor scores to blocks
available <- names(fs_all)

bbb <- intersect(block_labels$BBB, available)
bub <- intersect(block_labels$BUB, available)
brb <- intersect(block_labels$BRB, available)

message("BBB members: ", paste(bbb, collapse = ", "))
message("BUB members: ", paste(bub, collapse = ", "))
message("BRB members: ", paste(brb, collapse = ", "))

# Require at least 2 indicators per block
ok <- c(length(bbb) >= 2, length(bub) >= 2, length(brb) >= 2)
if (!all(ok)) {
  stop("Not all blocks have ≥2 indicators: ",
       paste(c("BBB","BUB","BRB")[!ok], collapse = ", "))
}

# Build second-order CFA syntax
make_block_syntax <- function(block_name, members) {
  paste0(block_name, " =~ ", paste(members, collapse = " + "))
}

stage3_syntax <- paste(
  "# First-order factor scores treated as observed (unit-variance proxies)",
  "# Second-order blocks",
  make_block_syntax("BBB", bbb),
  make_block_syntax("BUB", bub),
  make_block_syntax("BRB", brb),
  sep = "\n"
)
cat(stage3_syntax, "\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: bbb-bub-brb-fit
#| cache: true
fit_block <- tryCatch(
  lavaan::cfa(stage3_syntax, data = fs_complete,
              estimator = "MLR", std.lv = TRUE),
  error = function(e) { message("Block CFA failed: ", e$message); NULL })

if (!is.null(fit_block) && lavaan::lavInspect(fit_block, "converged")) {
  fm <- lavaan::fitMeasures(fit_block,
          c("chisq","df","cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic"))
  message(sprintf("Block CFA: CFI=%.3f TLI=%.3f RMSEA=%.3f SRMR=%.3f",
                  fm["cfi"], fm["tli"], fm["rmsea"], fm["srmr"]))

  # Factor loadings
  std <- lavaan::standardizedSolution(fit_block)
  loadings <- std[std$op == "=~", c("lhs","rhs","est.std","pvalue")]
  names(loadings) <- c("Block","Latent","lambda","p")
  loadings |>
    dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(c(lambda, p), ~ round(.x, 3))) |>
    gt::gt() |>
    gt::tab_header("BBB / BUB / BRB — standardised loadings") |>
    gt::sub_missing(missing_text = "—")
} else {
  message("Block CFA did not converge or was not estimated.")
}
```

```{r}
#| label: bbb-bub-brb-intercorr
if (exists("fit_block") && !is.null(fit_block) &&
    lavaan::lavInspect(fit_block, "converged")) {
  # Inter-block correlations
  std <- lavaan::standardizedSolution(fit_block)
  cors <- std[std$op == "~~" & std$lhs != std$rhs,
              c("lhs","rhs","est.std")]
  names(cors) <- c("Block_A","Block_B","r_std")
  cors |>
    dplyr::mutate(r_std = round(r_std, 3)) |>
    gt::gt() |>
    gt::tab_header("Inter-block latent correlations (BBB / BUB / BRB)")
}
```

# Stage 4 — Third-order grand brand equity (optional)

```{r}
#| label: grand-be-optional
#| eval: false
# Activate once Stage 3 converges cleanly.
# Adds a single Brand Equity (GBE) factor above BBB, BUB, BRB.
grand_syntax <- paste(
  stage3_syntax,
  "\n# Third-order grand factor",
  "GBE =~ BBB + BUB + BRB",
  sep = "\n"
)
fit_grand <- tryCatch(
  lavaan::cfa(grand_syntax, data = fs_complete,
              estimator = "MLR", std.lv = TRUE),
  error = function(e) { message("Grand CFA failed: ", e$message); NULL })
if (!is.null(fit_grand) && lavaan::lavInspect(fit_grand, "converged")) {
  print(lavaan::fitMeasures(fit_grand,
        c("chisq","df","cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic")))
}
```

# Session info {.unnumbered}
```{r}
#| label: sessioninfo
sessionInfo()
```
